complete stay records for enrollees who had an inpatient hospital stay. Records include fee-for-service (FFS) claims and encounter records submitted for stays covered by Medicaid managed care.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
10 diagnosis code fields
7 procedure code fields
Discharge status
Charges and payments (FFS only)
Provider identifier             
Special considerations
